main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'ClO2 intrusion fish farm + chlorite + ClO2- penetrates oxidizing polyamide' literal — captura ClO2 + clorito (2 de 3 hipótesis del Open).

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (biofouling, envejecimiento, SBS inadecuado, ClO2- residual).

recommended_action.justification: Install secondary oxidant removal GAC column 10 min EBCT o catalytic carbon — match gold (CAG específico).

requested_data.justification: Pide ClO2- en captación base torre y RO simultaneously — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: lab externo erróneo o ORP/cloro total baseline → switch.
